geofence_checks.name: Location is coarse only
geofence_checks.detail: Stored locality is region/coarse geohash prefix; exact location is explicitly out of scope.

geofence_checks.name: Only opted-in local collectors qualify
geofence_checks.detail: Matches are scoped to same country plus exact coarse-prefix or same-region buckets.

geofence_checks.name: Blocks and mutes are enforced
geofence_checks.detail: Muted and blocked collectors are excluded in the SQL.

geofence_checks.name: Public projection hides raw identity and location fields
geofence_checks.detail: Returned columns omit raw owner user IDs and exact/coarse location internals.

geofence_checks.name: Web and mobile call the same RPC
geofence_checks.detail: App/web parity uses the same local community feed RPC.

wishlist_checks.name: Wishlist table exists
wishlist_checks.detail: Wishlist rows are stored against card_prints IDs.

wishlist_checks.name: Wishlist RLS is owner-only
wishlist_checks.detail: Wishlist items are protected by user-owned RLS.

wishlist_checks.name: Wishlist is a known interaction signal
wishlist_checks.detail: card_signals allows wishlist as a signal type.

wishlist_checks.name: Nearby RPC joins wishlist data
wishlist_checks.detail: Expected when nearby feed can rank or label cards that match the viewer wishlist.

wishlist_checks.name: Nearby response exposes a wishlist match field
wishlist_checks.detail: Expected when app/web can show a deterministic wishlist-match reason.

wishlist_checks.name: Nearby surfaces advertise wishlist matching
wishlist_checks.detail: Expected only after the RPC provides deterministic match data.

recommendation: Run authenticated live RPC smoke with seeded viewer/wishlist rows.
